failedAssertions.reason: Analysis SQL is not exclusively validation-filtered as written in the assertion; query_exclusion_counts scans all rows without a WHERE manipulation_check='passed' AND results_valid=true filter.
Mayor research log contains no Phase 0 budget-check or remaining-budget entries, so required per-iteration gate behavior is not evidenced.
Audit shows Review Board and Idea Factory activity, but no loop-phase record proves Mayor waited for both completions before proceeding to Phase 2.
Observed Red Team review bead has no blocking dependencies and no before/after ready transition tied to gate closure.
Only one test convoy exists and it tracks zero items, so Phase 3 parallel experiment execution via convoy is not evidenced.
Research log lacks required Phase 5 content for conclusions and post-mortem findings, so full strategy-update record is incomplete.
Shutdown artifacts are incomplete: no summary bead, no final analysis bead, no FINAL_REPORT.md, and town remains running.

Baseline arm is eval-compatible (slop-code eval --overwrite exit 0 with checkpoint_results schema), but two-agent arm is not eval-compatible (slop-code eval --overwrite exit 1: 'No problems to evaluate') and has no checkpoint_results.jsonl, so metric schema parity is not satisfied.
Baseline and two-agent arms do not have identical checkpoint directories for file_backup: baseline has checkpoint_1, while two-agent output is missing the problem checkpoint tree.
Red Team review bead does not block any batch work. The observed review bead has zero dependents and no blocks dependencies.
Red Team review bead does not contain numbered actionable objections with problem, impact, and suggested fix. Current description is unstructured.
Hypothesis metadata contract is not uniformly satisfied. Two hypothesis beads are missing all required provenance fields.
Provenance-linked evidence does not satisfy web-search-before-hypothesis requirement. All checked hypothesis-to-KB pairs violate web-search label and/or strict earlier timestamp conditions.
Happy-path run exited 0, but output was not eval-compatible. `slop-code eval` failed with 'No problems to evaluate' and the run output lacked problem checkpoint directories.
With a very small budget cap ($0.01), the run completed all checkpoints and exited 0 without a budget-exceeded abort.
Runner output structure was not eval-compatible. `checkpoint_results.jsonl` and problem checkpoint directories were missing, and eval failed.
Boundary value `--budget-split 100` was accepted and reviewer phase was skipped, but output was still not eval-compatible (`No problems to evaluate`).

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Delta SQL logic matches required join and subtraction pattern, but no experiments exist (0 total, 0 valid), so no real matched query results are available to validate computed deltas.
Generated report contains an erosion comparison section, but the only analysis conclusion bead is a no-data notice with no erosion comparison, and there are 0 validated experiments.
Report includes budget efficiency structure, but conclusion evidence does not include a budget efficiency comparison and there are 0 validated experiments for computation.
Final report exclusion rows are present and match Dolt counts (all zero), but the available conclusion bead does not provide failure-type exclusion breakdown and is explicitly a no-data conclusion.
Report includes verbosity and erosion slope sections with a verbosity difference line, but conclusion evidence does not include a slope comparison and reflects a no-data state.
Hypothesis artifacts exist, but no experiment rows, conclusion beads, or final report links complete the required end-to-end hypothesis lifecycle chain.
Budget table is initialized, but experiment count and total spend remain zero, so cost-propagation into Mayor loop gating cannot be exercised.
Required batch-review-objection-response-convoy timestamp sequence is absent; only an unrelated test blocks edge is present.
Upstream provenance links (KB to hypothesis) exist, but experiment/analysis/report links are missing, so full backward provenance chain cannot be completed.
Critical routes correctly include human channels, but no critical escalations for the specific events budget exhausted or research complete were found.
No low-budget execution scenario is present (budget spent remains 0 and no reduced-batch planning artifact exists), so proportional batch-size reduction cannot be validated.
No Proposed Batch bead was found, so required fields (rationale/configs/expected outcomes/budget estimate) cannot be checked.
No objection/response artifact pair was found for Red Team review, so objection-by-objection Mayor responses cannot be validated.
Formula mol-scbench-experiment exists, but no experiment molecules were found to verify Phase 3 molecule-to-formula linkage.
No experiments and no conclusion beads are present, so post-execution Review Board dispatch/analysis sequencing cannot be validated.
No Red Team post-mortem bead exists and research log has no post-mortem reference, so dispatch/read behavior cannot be verified.
Blocked by missing experiment data. The only Review Board conclusion is a no-data bead, and experiments table count is zero, so validated-only experiment referencing cannot be confirmed.
Blocked by missing experiment data. The conclusion bead is explicitly a no-data analysis and does not contain pass-rate delta, erosion slope comparison, or budget efficiency metrics.
Blocked because no Red Team post-mortem beads were found by title, label, or text search, so non-blocking dependency checks cannot be exercised.

Per-phase budget split enforcement could not be validated. Metrics did not include implementer/reviewer cost fields and all tracked tokens/costs were zero; reviewer artifacts contained `No module named slop_code.__main__` errors.
Canary preflight failed at API validation (HTTP 401 Unauthorized), so the capped run and eval-compatible output requirements could not be exercised.
Component diagnostics are descriptive for both invalid API key and Docker-unavailable scenarios, but full canary pipeline validation remains blocked by API preflight/auth failure.

Concurrent runs used distinct run IDs and output directories, but full container-level and per-run spend isolation could not be confirmed because produced runs showed zero spend and no active container evidence.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated known frictions to reflect current runner behavior for --budget-split 100, canary 401 preflight failures, and slop-code run CLI flag compatibility.

frictions: bd/gt binaries were not on default PATH in fresh shell invocations; commands required explicit PATH export to /home/ubuntu/gopath/bin and /home/ubuntu/go/bin.
No dedicated post-mortem artifacts were present in the current rig dataset, requiring assertion VAL-ROLES-007 to remain blocked.
Review Board conclusion artifacts are no-data only because experiments table has zero rows, limiting direct validation for VAL-ROLES-002 and VAL-ROLES-004.
gt/bd commands emit a repeated unsigned-binary warning on stderr, which adds noise to captured logs.
Query field names differed from initial assumptions (e.g., experiments.created_at/total_cost and comments.text), requiring schema inspection before final evidence queries.
Escalation routing config resides at /home/ubuntu/gt/settings/escalation.json instead of rig-local .gt/settings path.
Runner reports checkpoint completion with zero tokens/cost while reviewer suggestion artifacts contain `No module named slop_code.__main__`, making budget telemetry interpretation difficult.
Canary validation is blocked by NVIDIA API key auth failures in this environment, so full canary pipeline checks cannot be completed.

Fresh-run attempt hit CLI surface drift in this environment: slop-code run does not accept --output-dir and two_agent_runner rejected model alias nvidia/nvidia-bedrock-claude-haiku-4-5. Validation proceeded with current shell-produced run artifacts copied into /tmp/scbench-user-testing/pipeline-l for isolated checks.
slop-code eval on previously evaluated baseline artifacts requires --overwrite; otherwise it exits with 'No problems to evaluate'.
blockers: Dolt experiments table currently has 0 rows (0 validated), so analysis conclusions requiring real experiment comparisons are blocked by missing data.
Missing experiment execution data in Dolt experiments table (0 rows) blocked VAL-ROLES-002 and VAL-ROLES-004.
No Red Team post-mortem beads found blocked VAL-ROLES-007.
Experiments table currently has zero rows and budget spent is 0.00, preventing lifecycle and budget-flow assertions from being exercised end-to-end.
No active loop artifacts for proposed batches, post-mortems, conclusions, summary/final analysis beads, or final report were found during this validation window.
NVIDIA canary preflight failed with HTTP 401 Unauthorized, preventing full canary execution and eval checks.
Per-phase spend telemetry needed for budget-split and concurrency cost-isolation assertions was unavailable from produced artifacts.
